title: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
why_this_song: I Wanna Dance with Somebody by Whitney Houston (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 36 times; first heard in: "I want to dance"
Appears 30 times; first heard in: "Oh! I wanna dance with somebody"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "With somebody who loves me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Don't you wanna dance(dance) with me baby?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I wanna feel the heat with somebody"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somebody" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Sooner or later the fever ends
Yeah! I wanna dance with somebody

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "I Wanna Dance with Somebody" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "I Wanna Dance with Somebody", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Wanna Dance with Somebody" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Wanna Dance with Somebody" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Wanna Dance with Somebody", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Wanna Dance with Somebody", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
